category_sources: Official Google Code Archive homepage at https://code.google.com/archive/p/memcache-top is the archived upstream project surface.
source_facts.description says "Grab real-time stats from memcache".
display_name_sources: Official archived project URL path is /p/memcache-top.
docs_sources: Official Google Code Archive project page is the best remaining official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: No current official source-control project URL was found; the available official surface is the Google Code Archive, which is not a source-control project URL.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists memcache-top as the CLI executable.
